_comment: Canonical MCP server list. Single source of truth fanned out to Claude Code (~/.claude.json), OMP (~/.omp/agent/mcp.json), and Codex (~/.codex/config.toml) by ai/mcp/apply-mcp.sh. linear uses keyless OAuth via mcp-remote (first use prompts an interactive login, then caches). A server that needs a static API key can add an `auth` object { header, prefix, op, env } resolved via 1Password (op://) on nix machines or an env var in containers. Project-specific servers belong in each project's .mcp.json, not here.
